secrets.description: Signs all session tokens — must be 64+ bytes random hex
scrypt hash (salt:hash) of operator console password
secrets.rotationMethod: node -e "const c=require('crypto'); const salt=c.randomBytes(16).toString('hex'); const h=c.scryptSync(PASS,salt,64).toString('hex'); console.log(salt+':'+h);"
secrets.newPasswordNote: DELIVER VIA SECURE CHANNEL — delete from this file after delivery

secrets.description: HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification — old value was a guessable string
secrets.actionRequired: Update webhook secret in Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks to match new .env value

secrets.description: Groq inference API key — active model: llama-3.3-70b-versatile
secrets.actionRequired: MANUAL: Revoke at console.groq.com → API Keys → Delete → Create New. Then update .env on VPS.
secrets.rotationMethod: console.groq.com → API Keys → Create new key

secrets.actionRequired: MANUAL: Revoke at platform.openai.com → API Keys → Revoke → Create New. Update .env.

secrets.description: Meta WhatsApp Business API access token — controls your business phone number
secrets.actionRequired: MANUAL: Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp → System Users → Regenerate token. Update .env on VPS.

secrets.description: Telegram Bot API token — controls your Telegram bot
secrets.actionRequired: MANUAL: Message @BotFather on Telegram → /revoke → select bot → confirm. Update .env on VPS.

secrets.description: Live Razorpay publishable key — prefix rzp_live_
secrets.actionRequired: MANUAL: Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → API Keys → Regenerate Live Keys. Update RAZORPAY_KEY_ID + RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET + RAZORPAY_KEY + RAZORPAY_SECRET in .env on VPS.

secrets.description: Live Razorpay secret key — full value was committed in FINAL_PRODUCTION_CERTIFICATION.md
secrets.actionRequired: Same as RAZORPAY_KEY_ID — regenerate both together in Razorpay Dashboard

secrets.description: Duplicate alias for RAZORPAY_KEY_ID — both must be rotated together
Duplicate alias for RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET — both must be rotated together
Static string for WhatsApp webhook verification challenge
secrets.status: OK — low risk, rotate if WA_TOKEN is rotated

secrets.description: CORS allowlist — hardcoded in server.js plus env override

gitExposureSummary.noteOnHistory: Git history still contains the original values in old commits. To fully purge: use 'git filter-repo' or BFG Repo Cleaner, then force-push. Until then, treat all 8 exposed keys as compromised regardless of this commit.

logPatterns: startup: logs capability status (ai/telegram/whatsapp/payments) but NOT values
telegram: logs 'Bot started' but NOT the token
no console.log(process.env.*) for any secret key

backupAudit.fix: Removed .env copy from archive — now writes env-config-nonsecret.txt with only PORT/NODE_ENV/BASE_URL/etc
backupAudit.actionRequired: Delete existing backups/ archives after rotating all exposed keys — they contain .env.bak with old secrets
backupAudit.status: FIXED for future — existing archives must be deleted
